mnemonics.title: Protocol Port Numbers
mnemonics.content: Please Do Not Throw Sausage Pizza Away - 20/21(FTP), 22(SSH), 23(Telnet), 25(SMTP), 53(DNS), 80(HTTP), 110(POP3)

mnemonics.title: Traffic Analysis Steps
mnemonics.content: Collect Carefully, Analyze Thoroughly, Respond Appropriately - Collect data, Analyze patterns, Respond to findings
